case_title: RONALD SNYDER RESPONDENT VS. COMSELTING CORP DBA WEST COAST EAST COAST MOVERS APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SNYDER, RONALD RECOVER FROM APPELLANT COMSELTING CORP DBA WEST COAST EAST COAST MOVERS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT COMSELTING CORP DBA WEST COAST EAST COAST MOVERS AS TO RESPONDENT SNYDER, RONALD HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

TRIAL DE NOVO HELD IN D-525 ON WED., 04DEC02, 9:00AM; WITS S/EXM'D., DOC. EVID. INTRD'CD. & MRK'D; COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLNTF. RONALD SNYDER & AGAINST DEFENDANT COMSELTING CORP. DBA WEST COAST EAST COAST MOVERS FOR $5,000.00, NO ATTORNEYS FEES, AND $95.00 COSTS. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HICKS; CSR: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
